title: andryala conyzoides
intro: Andryala conyzoides, also known as Mediterranean Andryala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. Andryala conyzoides can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies, such as teas and salves, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
